title: Spear-Menta
description: A modpack for monumenta(Also supports Pojav and forks)
body:
My Second modpack, Ya'll welcome... 
### Spear-Menta !

A Newly-Made and Freshly-Menta(ed)
Modpack to try and give you a New(or newer)
Experience.

Also supports: PojavLauncher(And forks of it)

Todo list:

- Try and add support to SteamDeck/Steamos 
- idk...

FAQ Section(Ongoing probs):
------------

Q1. "What's this new modpack?"

A1. A Newly-Made Modpack by me for the [Monumenta server](https://playmonumenta.com/)(Also supports Pojav and forks).

Q2. "WDYM by Pojav and forks?"

A2. Here's [Pojav](https://pojavlauncher.app/) & Here's a fork [Example](https://zalithlauncher.cn/)

Q3. "What Mods/RP's does the Modpack use?"

A3. You can check [Here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/spear-menta/versions)
(Modpack-> Versions-> Click on a specific version to [See](https://modrinth.com/modpack/spear-menta/version/V0.1-sr))
